query_title: God's Not Dead: We The People

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead: A Light in Darkness
recommendations.overview: Pastor Dave responds to the unimaginable tragedy of having his church, located on the grounds of the local university, burned down.

recommendations.title: In Search of Darkness
recommendations.overview: An exploration of '80s horror movies through the perspective of the actors, directors, producers and SFX craftspeople who made them, and their impact on contemporary cinema.

recommendations.title: Hustle

recommendations.title: Pawn
recommendations.overview: A petty robbery spirals into a tense hostage situation after three gunmen hold up a diner that's a front for the mob.

recommendations.title: Deadly Prey
recommendations.overview: A group of sadistic mercenaries led by Col. John Hogan kidnap Michael Danton from his home, and set him loose on the grounds of their secret camp to be used as training for new recruits. Danton has been called the "most perfect killer ever." Now, he'

recommendations.title: Saved!
recommendations.overview: Mary is a good Christian girl who goes to a good Christian high school where she has good Christian friends and a perfect Christian boyfriend. Her life seems perfect, until the day that she finds out that her boyfriend may be gay — and that she’s pre

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.

recommendations.title: In the Aisles
recommendations.overview: Christian, a reclusive young man from Leipzig, gets a job working the night shift at a big-box store. He's trained to stocks goods and operate a forklift by Bruno, a wistful former truck driver, who introduces Christian to a colorful group of overnig

recommendations.title: The Road
recommendations.overview: When five Kurdish prisoners are granted one week's home leave, they find to their dismay that they face continued oppression outside of prison from their families, the culture, and the government.

recommendations.title: In the Loop
recommendations.overview: The US President and the UK Prime Minister are planning on launching a war in the Middle East, but—behind the scenes—government officials and advisers are either promoting the war or are trying to prevent it.
